System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference PLGW453_Var_001004_00.03.07.ddt_20171108T173751.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 7D8
Receive ID 7C8
Functional Addr 97
Functional Name PLC/PLGW
